title: SearchRequest
description: Request body for JQL search via POST.

startAt.description: The index of the first item to return (page offset).

maxResults.description: The maximum number of items to return per page.

validateQuery.description: Whether to validate the JQL query. Accepted values: strict, warn, none.

fields.description: Fields to return for each issue.

fieldsByKeys.description: Whether to reference fields by keys rather than IDs.
